allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-OdbcDriver | Where-Object {$_.Name -like '*SQL Server*'} | Select-Object Name,Platform | Format-Table -HideTableHeaders")
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-OdbcDriver | Where-Object {$_.Name -like "*SQL Server*"} | Select-Object Name,Platform | Format-Table -HideTableHeaders')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Invoke-Sqlcmd -ServerInstance 'DESKTOP-4AI2SO6\\SQLEXPRESS' -Database 'VNCultureBridgeAI' -Query \\"SELECT TOP 1 TieuDeVI, TieuDeEN FROM dbo.BaiViet\\" | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 5")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "$rows = Invoke-Sqlcmd -ServerInstance 'DESKTOP-4AI2SO6\\SQLEXPRESS' -Database 'VNCultureBridgeAI' -Query \\"SELECT TOP 3 DanhMucID, MaDanhMuc, TenVI, TenEN FROM dbo.DanhMuc WHERE HoatDong = 1 ORDER BY DanhMucID\\"; $rows | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 5")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '$rows = Invoke-Sqlcmd -ServerInstance "DESKTOP-4AI2SO6\\SQLEXPRESS" -Database "VNCultureBridgeAI" -Query "SELECT TOP 3 DanhMucID, MaDanhMuc, TenVI, TenEN FROM dbo.DanhMuc WHERE HoatDong = 1 ORDER BY DanhMucID"; $rows | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 5')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '$rows = Invoke-Sqlcmd -ServerInstance "DESKTOP-4AI2SO6\\SQLEXPRESS" -Database "VNCultureBridgeAI" -Query "SELECT TOP 3 VungID, MaVung, TenVI, TenEN FROM dbo.VungVanHoa WHERE HoatDong = 1 ORDER BY VungID"; $rows | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 5')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '$rows = Invoke-Sqlcmd -ServerInstance "DESKTOP-4AI2SO6\\SQLEXPRESS" -Database "VNCultureBridgeAI" -Query "SELECT TOP 3 vv.VungID, vv.MaVung, vv.TenVI, vv.TenEN, COUNT\(DISTINCT bv.BaiVietID\) AS ArticleCount FROM dbo.VungVanHoa vv LEFT JOIN dbo.BaiViet_Vung bvv ON bvv.VungID = vv.VungID LEFT JOIN dbo.BaiViet bv ON bv.BaiVietID = bvv.BaiVietID AND bv.TrangThaiDuyet = ''APPROVED'' AND bv.TrangThaiXuatBan = ''PUBLISHED'' WHERE vv.HoatDong = 1 GROUP BY vv.VungID, vv.MaVung, vv.TenVI, vv.TenEN ORDER BY ArticleCount DESC, vv.VungID ASC"; $rows | Select-Object * -ExcludeProperty RowError, RowState, Table, ItemArray, HasErrors | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 6')

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '$rows = Invoke-Sqlcmd -ServerInstance "DESKTOP-4AI2SO6\\SQLEXPRESS" -Database "VNCultureBridgeAI" -Query "SELECT TOP 3 bv.BaiVietID, bv.MaBaiViet, bv.TieuDeVI, bv.TieuDeEN, bv.MoTaNganVI, bv.MoTaNganEN, bv.NgayXuatBan FROM dbo.BaiViet bv WHERE bv.TrangThaiDuyet = ''APPROVED'' AND bv.TrangThaiXuatBan = ''PUBLISHED'' ORDER BY bv.NgayXuatBan DESC, bv.BaiVietID DESC"; $rows | Select-Object * -ExcludeProperty RowError, RowState, Table, ItemArray, HasErrors | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 6')
